name: Cranberry-Glazed Ham Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces boneless ham, cut into 16 -1-1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Using 8 wooden or metal skewers, thread 2 ham chunks, 4 pineapple chunks and equal amounts of red and green pepper pieces on each.
2. Place the kabobs in a single layer on a shallow baking pan.
3. In a small bowl, mix together cranberry sauce, ground cloves, dry mustard, and cider vinegar.
4. Pour the mixture over the kabobs.
5. Bake in a 400ºF oven for 15-20 minutes, basting often.
6. Serve immediately.
Description:
"Serve ham this holiday and really give thanks for delicious leftovers. These kabobs are easy to prepare and combine leftover ham and cranberry sauce."
Source: "National Pork Producers Council"
http://www.nppc.org
